notes: Game said it is unsupported on "Proton, wine, and steamdeck" likely due to anti-cheat
Does not start and gives the following error: Unsupported on "Proton, wine, and steamdeck"
EA Javelin anti-cheat is blocking the game on Linux.

EA and their Anti Cheat don't support Linux and explicitly check if they are running under Proton/Wine to give you a message informing about that. I'm not even sure the game ever actually tries to run at all. It is unlikely that this and future F1 games will ever work under Linux, unless a solution to bypass the Anti Cheat and play in a sort of offline mode is found. In conclusion, if you want to play this, you'll have to use Windows, or go play any other F1 game before F1 24.

I understand not allowing multiplayer on linux, but not even allowing to launch the Game and play Singleplayer has to be the dumbest thing ever. EA genuinely is the worst. Don't buy this Game. It's a shame, I played for an hour on Windows and the Game itself is fine, but in the end not worth having to switch OS every time so I refunded it.
